claimText: The Global Environment Facility (GEF) was established in 1992 during the Rio Earth Summit.
evidenceExcerpt: established in 1992 during the Rio Earth Summit.
examUse: Statement-based question on the origin and timeline of GEF.

claimText: The Global Environment Facility (GEF) is located in Washington, D.C., USA.
evidenceExcerpt: Global Environment Facility (GEF) is located in Washington, D.C., USA.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching international organizations with their headquarters.

claimText: The GEF acts as a financial mechanism for five major conventions: UNFCCC, UNCBD, UNCCD, Minamata Convention, and Stockholm Convention.
evidenceExcerpt: It acts as a financial mechanism for 5 major international environmental conventions: UNFCCC, UNCBD, UNCCD, Minamata Convention on Mercury, and Stockholm Convention on Persistent Organic Pollutants (POPs).
examUse: Multiple-statement question identifying which conventions are funded by the GEF.

claimText: The first Assembly of the Global Environment Facility (GEF) was held in India in 1998.
evidenceExcerpt: The 1st Assembly took place in India in 1998.
examUse: Statement-based question regarding India's historical involvement with the GEF.
distractorHooks: 1st Assembly took place in Washington, D.C.
1st Assembly took place in Rio de Janeiro
